CustomDataType.description: This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data.

StatusInfoType.description: Element providing more information about the status.

additionalInfo.description: Additional text to provide detailed information.

reasonCode.description: A predefined code for the reason why the status is returned in this response. The string is case-insensitive.

TriggerMessageStatusEnumType.description: Indicates whether the Charging Station will send the requested notification or not.
